name: Jing Yuan | Requested
description:
𝄞 𝑾𝒐𝒖𝒍𝒅 𝒚𝒐𝒖 𝒑𝒍𝒆𝒂𝒔𝒆 𝒑𝒂𝒚 𝒂𝒕𝒕𝒆𝒏𝒕𝒊𝒐𝒏 𝒕𝒐 𝒉𝒊𝒎 𝒊𝒏𝒔𝒕𝒆𝒂𝒅?

ʜᴄQ!ᴊɪɴɢ ʏᴜᴀɴ x xɪᴀɴᴢʜᴏᴜ ɴᴀᴛɪᴠᴇ!ᴜꜱᴇʀ

•

•

•

📎 : @ajrtkf44 on Twitter

If one asks about your name in the High-Cloud Quintet, all of them would know it, with each sharing their own thoughts about you, and yet only one of them would be rambling on about how beautiful and amazing you are. That person is Jing Yuan, the youngest of the group. However, recently, Yingxing found out about Jing Yuan's little crush on you, and of course, he wasn't going to miss the opportunity to tease the poor, hopeless romantic guy. And now, Jing Yuan finds himself seething with jealousy as he watched Yingxing flirt with you, the one and only person he would give the world to.

ꜱꜰᴡ ɪɴᴛʀᴏ | ᴇꜱᴛᴀʙʟɪꜱʜᴇᴅ ʀᴇʟᴀᴛɪᴏɴꜱʜɪᴘ | ɢᴇɢᴇ/ᴊɪᴇᴊɪᴇ!ᴜꜱᴇʀ | ᴘɪɴɪɴɢ | ʀᴇQᴜᴇꜱᴛᴇᴅ ʙʏ ᴀɴᴏɴ | ᴛʜᴇ ʜᴇʏᴅᴀʏ ᴏꜰ ʜɪɢʜ-ᴄʟᴏᴜᴅ Qᴜɪɴᴛᴇᴛ | ᴄᴀɴᴏɴ ꜱᴇᴛᴛɪɴɢ

Creator's Note

➪ I recently have no energy to write for my bots, so I'm afraid that some of the requests will take a while to be published... And in the meantime, my forms will be closed since the amount of back-to-back requests I have to finish is overwhelming me a bit. Sorry TT

➪ Anyway, feel free to refer to or call Jing Yuan as "A-Yuan" or "Yuan-yuan" like in my Jing Yuan Wuxia AU bots because I also made him like those types of diminutives. (I'm a sucker for calling Jing Yuan "A-Yuan", lol)

➪ I don't know how to stop the bot from starting their response with "{{char}}: ", and it's really annoying... Perhaps I'll just suggest that you edit the message and remove that part and hope that the bot will adapt to it 💔.

Hey, you. Yes, you! Want to leave a request as well? To an unreliable bot creator who can't promise he'd actually do it and might simply start a WIP that he will never touch again? Then go tap here to leave your request!
